dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noDataDescription: No accounts are assigned to your user or no data is available for the selected period.
dashboard.realtimeAnalytics: Real-time analytics from your OlaClick accounts
dashboard.dailyOrderTrends: Daily order trends over the selected period (separate lines for each account)
dashboard.dailyRevenueTrends: Daily revenue trends over the selected period (separate lines for each account)
dashboard.noOrderData: No order data available for the selected period
dashboard.switchDateRangeMessage: Switch to a predefined date range to view detailed service metrics

dailyGoal.subtitle: Beat your best {day} sales from the last 3 months
dailyGoal.noRecordYet: No {day} record yet — today sets the bar.
dailyGoal.remaining: {amount} to go to set a new record
dailyGoal.perAccountHint: Each account's own best {day} — the record date can differ per account

companyKitchen.title: Kitchen & SLA — all accounts
companyKitchen.subtitle: Combined prep performance across {n} account(s) with prep timestamps.
companyKitchen.noOrdersChannel: No orders with prep in this channel for the period.
companyKitchen.outOfSlaTitle: Late orders (over prep goal) — use ID in OlaClick
companyKitchen.breachTruncated: List shows the worst delays first; export full history from OlaClick if needed.

kitchenSla.title: Kitchen SLA
kitchenSla.subtitle: Per-employee prep performance for users tagged as kitchen. Each order is attributed to every cook who was clocked-in when it was prepared.
kitchenSla.subtitleHub: Performance per service per account is the main scoreboard; the per-cook leaderboard below it is the same data attributed to whoever was clocked-in.
kitchenSla.rateInfoTooltip: Share of prepped orders that finished within the per-channel SLA target. Targets are configured in Setup → SLA goals; orders without a real prep stamp (closed without being marked ready) are excluded.
kitchenSla.matrixSubtitle: On-time % of prepped orders, with order count and average prep time. Counts every prepped order — independent of cook tagging.
kitchenSla.matrixEmpty: No kitchen orders with prep stamps in this window.
kitchenSla.leaderboardSubtitle: Same orders, attributed per cook clocked-in at prepared_at.
kitchenSla.avgTeamSizeHelp: Average number of kitchen users clocked-in when this cook's orders were prepped. 1× = solo shift, 2× = paired, etc.
kitchenSla.attributionNote: Attribution model: every cook clocked-in at prepared_at is credited with the order; cook_count (team size) is stored on each row so wins/losses are shared across the shift, not pinned to a single person.
kitchenSla.noData: No kitchen-SLA data for the selected window. Tag users as kitchen on the Admin page and wait for the next compute pass.
kitchenSla.coverageTooltip: % of orders where the waiter marked prep. Low coverage means SLA numbers are not trustworthy.

notifications.title: Notification Status

notifications.adminDescription: Get notified about sales reports and updates

notifications.multiDeviceDescription: You can enable notifications on multiple devices (phone, tablet, computer). Admins receive sales reports based on frequency settings. Employees receive shift updates and pay notifications.

notifications.notificationsBlocked: Notifications are blocked. Please enable them in your browser settings.
notifications.pleaseAllowNotifications: Please allow notifications to receive updates.
notifications.salesReportsEnabled: You will now receive sales reports every {frequency}
notifications.importantNotificationsEnabled: You will now receive important notifications from your company.
notifications.enableFailed: Failed to enable notifications. Please try again.
notifications.noLongerReceive: You will no longer receive push notifications

pwa.installDescription: Install for a faster, fullscreen experience.
pwa.step1: 1. Tap the Share button in Safari (square with an up arrow).
pwa.step2: 2. Scroll and choose Add to Home Screen.
pwa.step3: 3. Tap Add in the top‑right corner.
pwa.tip: Tip: If you don't see the option, scroll the sheet up to reveal more actions.
pwa.desktopInstructions: If you see an install icon in the address bar or menu, click it to add the app.

holidays.title: Holiday Management
holidays.subtitle: Track employee holiday accrual and usage
holidays.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this holiday record?
holidays.insufficientBalance: Insufficient holiday balance for the requested days
holidays.invalidDateRange: Start date must be before or equal to end date

account.kitchenPrepSubtitle: Median minutes from preparing → ready (non-cancelled orders; mean is also available on hover). Uses account timezone for daily breakdown.
account.kitchenNoPrepDetail: No orders with both preparing and ready timestamps in this period.
account.kitchenByChannelHint: Sorted by lowest on-time rate first.
account.accountSettingsHint: Kitchen prep goals (SLA), monthly fixed costs, and card / delivery fees for this location.
account.kitchenOutOfSlaEmpty: No orders exceeded the prep goal in this period.

breachCause.marked_at_close_tooltip: The waiter forgot to mark the order prepared on time; they only tapped it {minutes} min before closing.
breachCause.marked_at_close_tooltip_generic: The waiter forgot to mark the order prepared on time; they only tapped it just before closing.
breachCause.order_sat_ready_tooltip: The order sat ready {minutes} min before it was closed. Service / delivery delay, not a kitchen delay.
breachCause.order_sat_ready_tooltip_generic: The order sat ready well before it was closed. Service / delivery delay, not a kitchen delay.
breachCause.kitchen_delay_likely_tooltip: Doesn't match any late-marking pattern. Most likely a real cook delay.

causePill.kitchenDelayTooltip: Out-of-goal orders with no late waiter mark and no long wait. Most likely a real kitchen delay.
causePill.waiterMissedTooltip: Orders without a timely prep mark. Includes those excluded from SLA (prep == close) and those marked right at close.
causePill.slowDeliveryTooltip: Orders that sat ready more than 15 min before close. Delivery or service delay, not a kitchen delay.

account.serviceMetricsInfo: Service metrics are only available for predefined periods (Today, Yesterday, etc.)
account.noAccountData: No account data for this period.

achievements.title: Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Celebrate sales, profit, and team milestones — per location and company-wide.
achievements.locationCount: {count} active locations — company goals scale automatically when new stores are added.
achievements.allUnlockedSubtitle: Every goal in this view is unlocked. Keep the momentum going.
achievements.noGoals: No goals match the current filters.
achievements.catalogSubtitle: All achievement tiers across accounts and company totals.
achievements.teamAllGoalDay: All locations hit daily objective same day

categoriesDesc.sales: Gross revenue targets for the selected period.
categoriesDesc.profit: Net gain after costs — aligned with your gain calendar objective.
categoriesDesc.orders: Total orders processed in the period.
categoriesDesc.streak: Consecutive profitable or on-target days within the month.

acc-d-sales-2k.title: Opening bell
acc-d-sales-2k.desc: First celebration — S/ 2,000 in daily sales.

acc-d-sales-45k.title: Strong day
acc-d-sales-45k.desc: S/ 4,500 in daily sales — worth celebrating!

acc-d-profit-positive.title: In the green
acc-d-profit-positive.desc: Finish the day with positive net gain.

acc-d-profit-goal.title: Daily gain objective
acc-d-profit-goal.desc: Hit S/ 2,000 net gain (same as gain calendar target).

acc-d-profit-super.title: Super profit day
acc-d-profit-super.desc: S/ 3,000 net gain in one day.

acc-m-sales-50k.title: Monthly baseline
acc-m-sales-50k.desc: S/ 50,000 in monthly sales — your per-store bronze pace.

acc-m-sales-100k.title: Monthly legend
acc-m-sales-100k.desc: S/ 100,000 in monthly sales at one location.

acc-m-profit-goal.title: Monthly gain objective
acc-m-profit-goal.desc: Hit the scaled monthly gain target (S/ 2k × operating days).

acc-m-streak-goal-3.title: On target
acc-m-streak-goal-3.desc: Three consecutive days hitting the gain objective.

acc-m-streak-goal-7.title: Perfect week
acc-m-streak-goal-7.desc: Seven consecutive days hitting the gain objective.

co-d-sales-3k.title: Company opens
co-d-sales-3k.desc: Combined sales reach S/ 1,500 per location.

co-d-sales-4k.title: Company rhythm
co-d-sales-4k.desc: Combined sales reach S/ 2,000 per location.

co-d-sales-5k.title: Great sales day
co-d-sales-5k.desc: Combined sales reach S/ 2,500 per location — ~S/ 5k with 2 stores on a strong day.

co-d-sales-7k.title: Company exceptional
co-d-sales-7k.desc: Combined sales reach S/ 3,500 per location.

co-d-profit-positive.title: Company in the green
co-d-profit-positive.desc: Combined net gain is positive today.

co-d-profit-goal.title: Company daily gain objective
co-d-profit-goal.desc: S/ 2,000 combined net gain today — Blast's current daily profit goal.

co-d-profit-stretch.title: Stretch profit day
co-d-profit-stretch.desc: S/ 3,500 combined net gain — end-of-year company target.

co-m-sales-100k.title: Company bronze month
co-m-sales-100k.desc: S/ 50,000 per location — S/ 100,000 combined with 2 stores (where you are now).

co-m-sales-125k.title: Company silver month
co-m-sales-125k.desc: Combined sales reach S/ 62,500 per location.

co-m-sales-150k.title: Company gold month
co-m-sales-150k.desc: Combined sales reach S/ 75,000 per location.

co-m-sales-180k.title: Company platinum month
co-m-sales-180k.desc: Combined sales reach S/ 90,000 per location.

co-m-profit-15k.title: Company profit month
co-m-profit-15k.desc: S/ 15,000 combined net gain this month.

co-m-profit-30k.title: Company profit leader
co-m-profit-30k.desc: S/ 30,000 combined net gain this month.

co-m-profit-goal.title: Company monthly gain objective
co-m-profit-goal.desc: Combined gain at S/ 2k/day pace for every day the company reported data.

co-m-all-goal-day.title: Synchronized success
co-m-all-goal-day.desc: Every operating location hits the gain objective on the same day.
